title: Control who can permanently delete items
excerpt:

posts.author: moritzm (Moritz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently everyone can permanently delete items including guests. This puts all data in permanent danger to be deleted.

I therefore suggest that there should be more granular permission settings who has access to the trash bin and can permanently delete items. (e.g. admin, board owners)
